zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant於1415年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾布洛布恩時，他的父親John de Saye II34歲，母親Maud Broxbourne20歲。他於1446年11月11日與Elizabeth Cheney在英國賀特福爾布洛布恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年4月12日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾布洛布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant于1415年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾布洛布恩时，他的父亲John de Saye II34岁，母亲Maud Broxbourne20岁。他于1446年11月11日与Elizabeth Cheney在英国賀特福爾布洛布恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1478年4月12日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾布洛布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Say
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Raymond , now also used as an independent given name, especially in North America. In some instances it may represent a transferred use of the surname Ray, which for the most part originated as a nickname, from Old French rei, roi ‘king’ ( compare Roy and Leroy ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: III,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

variants.name: Sargent
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English sergeaunt ‘servant’ (Old French sergent, serjant). The surname probably originated for the most part in this sense, but the word also developed a number of more specialized meanings in the medieval period, including ‘tenant by military service below the rank of knight’. It was also used for a variety of administrative and legal offices, which may have contributed to the development of the surname. The sense ‘non-commissioned officer’ did not arise until the 16th century. Compare Sergent .

History: William Sargent (1624–1717) came to Gloucester, MA, from Devon, England before 1678. Many of his descendants distinguished themselves in the civil and military affairs of the colonies and some in literary or artistic paths, notably the portrait painter John Singer Sargent (1856–1925).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant was born in 1415, in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Saye II, was 34 and his mother, Maud Broxbourne, was 20. He married Elizabeth Cheney on 11 November 1446, in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 April 1478, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant est né en 1415, à Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Saye II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud Broxbourne, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cheney le 11 novembre 1446, à Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

Er hat am 11. November 1446 in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England Elizabeth Cheney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. April 1478 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeantが1415年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブロクスボウルンで生まれた時，父John de Saye IIは34歳，母Maud Broxbourneは20歳であった。1446年11月11日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブロクスボウルンでElizabeth Cheneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年4月12日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアブロクスボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant(이)가 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 브록스보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Saye II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Broxbourne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1446년 11월 11일 영국 허트퍼드실르 브록스보우른에서 Elizabeth Cheney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 4월 12일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 브록스보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant nasceu em 1415, em Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Saye II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maud Broxbourne, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cheney em 11 de novembro de 1446, em Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1478, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England: Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Say of Broxbourne III, Kings Serjeant родился в 1415 г. в местности броксбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Saye II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Broxbourne, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cheney 11 ноября 1446 г. в местности броксбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 апреля 1478 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности броксбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Cheney el 11 de noviembre de 1446, en Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1478, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
